title: Join KwaNonqaba clean-up campaign
description: KWANONQABA NEWS - A clean-up campaign will...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS - A clean-up campaign will be held in the Barcelona Circle area, next to Watson Avenue in KwaNonqaba, from 09:00 until 14:00 on Sunday 19 October.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - A clean-up campaign will be held in the Barcelona Circle area, next to Watson Avenue in KwaNonqaba, from 09:00 until 14:00 on Sunday 19 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The project, known as the Visit Kwa Clean-up Campaign, is a community effort to restore pride, clean up the environment and show that the real beauty of Mossel Bay is in its people."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Campaign organiser and Mossel Bay resident Walter Blaq told Mossel Bay Advertiser the initiative was begun as a way to encourage more people to visit KwaNonqaba and push a more positive image of the area.","html":"Campaign organiser and Mossel Bay resident Walter Blaq told Mossel Bay Advertiser the initiative was begun as a way to encourage more people to visit KwaNonqaba and push a more positive image of the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Visitors will be able to see our culture, art and spirit,” he said.","html":"“Visitors will be able to see our culture, art and spirit,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Although the campaign might not change things immediately, keeping the environment and its surrounding areas clean and litter-free is a good place to start.","html":"Although the campaign might not change things immediately, keeping the environment and its surrounding areas clean and litter-free is a good place to start."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The hope is that the campaign will lead to positive work in the KwaNonqaba community and will continue in the future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Residents, local businesses, photographers and visitors are invited to join the clean-up.","html":"Residents, local businesses, photographers and visitors are invited to join the clean-up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
